name: Audit and Correct Facility Information Errors
description: The Green Valley Water Facility (Colchester, VT) has received a compliance deficiency notice from the State Emergency Response Commission (SERC) identifying multiple data errors in their most recent Tier II submission. The facility data contains errors in location information, classification codes, and contact details that must be corrected before the next submission deadline. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit application (already open), import the facility's data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\facility_errors_baseline.t2s. This file contains the facility's submission data as it was filed — with the errors identified by the SERC audit. You must identify and correct ALL facility-level data errors. The correct facility information is: Green Valley Water Facility is a water supply and irrigation systems facility (NAICS 221310) located in Chittenden County, VT, at coordinates 44.554437N, -73.167142W. The facility's mailing address is 7600 Henderson Way, Burlington, VT 05406. After correcting all errors, save and export the corrected submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\facility_corrected.t2s.
